items.title: S01E01 - Ramon
items.summary: Captain Barney Miller talks down a junkie who is holding the 12th Precinct hostage.

infolabels.title: Ramon
infolabels.plot: Captain Barney Miller talks down a junkie who is holding the 12th Precinct hostage.

items.title: S01E02 - Experience
items.summary: A bomber targets the 12th Precinct, as Det. Fish contemplates retirement.

infolabels.title: Experience
infolabels.plot: A bomber targets the 12th Precinct, as Det. Fish contemplates retirement.

items.title: S01E03 - Snow Job
items.summary: The squad grapples with guarding a department store payroll and a flasher who attempts suicide in the bathroom.

infolabels.title: Snow Job
infolabels.plot: The squad grapples with guarding a department store payroll and a flasher who attempts suicide in the bathroom.

items.title: S01E04 - Graft
items.summary: An old friend of Barney's is assigned to investigate allegations of corruption in the squadroom; Chano is after an obscene phone caller.

infolabels.title: Graft
infolabels.plot: An old friend of Barney's is assigned to investigate allegations of corruption in the squadroom; Chano is after an obscene phone caller.

items.title: S01E05 - The Courtesans
items.summary: A prostitute threatens to file harassment charges against Wojo; Rachel wants to move into her own apartment.

infolabels.title: The Courtesans
infolabels.plot: A prostitute threatens to file harassment charges against Wojo; Rachel wants to move into her own apartment.

items.title: S01E06 - Stakeout
items.summary: Well-meaning nosy neighbors overrun a covert stakeout operation.

infolabels.title: Stakeout
infolabels.plot: Well-meaning nosy neighbors overrun a covert stakeout operation.

items.title: S01E07 - Bureaucrat
items.summary: Guests to the 12th include a drunken bureaucrat and the 12-year-old who robbed Chano's apartment; Wojo closes the precinct's favorite delicatessen for minor health-code infractions.

infolabels.title: Bureaucrat
infolabels.plot: Guests to the 12th include a drunken bureaucrat and the 12-year-old who robbed Chano's apartment; Wojo closes the precinct's favorite delicatessen for minor health-code infractions.

items.title: S01E08 - Ms. Cop
items.summary: An overzealous lady cop ruffles the feathers of the testosterone-run 12th; Chano nabs an obscene phone caller. Linda Lavin (""Alice"") debuts as Detective Janice Wentworth.

infolabels.title: Ms. Cop
infolabels.plot: An overzealous lady cop ruffles the feathers of the testosterone-run 12th; Chano nabs an obscene phone caller. Linda Lavin (""Alice"") debuts as Detective Janice Wentworth.

items.title: S01E09 - Vigilante
items.summary: Barney is visited by Inspector Luger, who complains that his men aren't disliked enough by the public; a neighborhood vigilante is well into his twilight years; Wojo collars a cross-dressing teamster.

infolabels.title: Vigilante
infolabels.plot: Barney is visited by Inspector Luger, who complains that his men aren't disliked enough by the public; a neighborhood vigilante is well into his twilight years; Wojo collars a cross-dressing teamster.

items.title: S01E10 - The Guest
items.summary: The 12th Precinct reluctantly guards a mob witness; Chano uses his co-workers' own cash stash to set up a narcotics buy.

infolabels.title: The Guest
infolabels.plot: The 12th Precinct reluctantly guards a mob witness; Chano uses his co-workers' own cash stash to set up a narcotics buy.

items.title: S01E11 - Escape Artist
items.summary: A self-avowed ""bird-man"" drops in; Barney holds a resourceful escaped prisoner for the FBI; Harris decides to write a novel, setting up one of the series' most durable storylines.

infolabels.title: Escape Artist
infolabels.plot: A self-avowed ""bird-man"" drops in; Barney holds a resourceful escaped prisoner for the FBI; Harris decides to write a novel, setting up one of the series' most durable storylines.

items.title: S01E12 - Hair
items.summary: A scruffy ""Serpico""-type cop has good reason to hide behind unruly hair; Bernice discovers that Fish spent the afternoon in a massage parlor.

infolabels.title: Hair
infolabels.plot: A scruffy ""Serpico""-type cop has good reason to hide behind unruly hair; Bernice discovers that Fish spent the afternoon in a massage parlor.

items.title: S01E13 - The Hero
items.summary: Chano is guilt-stricken when he shoots a holdup man; Liz makes a citizen's arrest, after being robbed at ""stickpoint"" by a twelve-year-old.

infolabels.title: The Hero
infolabels.plot: Chano is guilt-stricken when he shoots a holdup man; Liz makes a citizen's arrest, after being robbed at ""stickpoint"" by a twelve-year-old.

items.title: S02E01 - Doomsday
items.summary: A disgruntled man with a belt of dynamite threatens to blow himself and the squad room sky high unless President Nixon agrees to speak with him; the plumbing goes kaput; Wojo arrests a phony man-of-the-cloth.

infolabels.title: Doomsday
infolabels.plot: A disgruntled man with a belt of dynamite threatens to blow himself and the squad room sky high unless President Nixon agrees to speak with him; the plumbing goes kaput; Wojo arrests a phony man-of-the-cloth.

items.title: S02E02 - The Social Worker
items.summary: Weary of housework, Liz tries her hand at social work, to Barney's dismay; a master forger fascinates Harris.

infolabels.title: The Social Worker
infolabels.plot: Weary of housework, Liz tries her hand at social work, to Barney's dismay; a master forger fascinates Harris.

items.title: S02E03 - The Layoff
items.summary: Barney, Fish and Yemana feel the crunch when a labor layoff forces them to do without Chano, Harris and Wojo; a manicurist goes deeper than the nail; a morose stockbroker takes to petty theft.

infolabels.title: The Layoff
infolabels.plot: Barney, Fish and Yemana feel the crunch when a labor layoff forces them to do without Chano, Harris and Wojo; a manicurist goes deeper than the nail; a morose stockbroker takes to petty theft.

items.title: S02E04 - Ambush
items.summary: Yemana is shot in full view of disinterested bystanders, and Barney is offered a job in Florida.

infolabels.title: Ambush
infolabels.plot: Yemana is shot in full view of disinterested bystanders, and Barney is offered a job in Florida.

items.title: S02E05 - Heat Wave
items.summary: A wife claims spousal abuse; Wojo and Wentworth are bait for a park rapist.

infolabels.title: Heat Wave
infolabels.plot: A wife claims spousal abuse; Wojo and Wentworth are bait for a park rapist.

items.title: S02E06 - The Arsonist
items.summary: The precinct is on the lookout for an arsonist; Chano brings in a man who used a deadly weapon on a vending machine.

infolabels.title: The Arsonist
infolabels.plot: The precinct is on the lookout for an arsonist; Chano brings in a man who used a deadly weapon on a vending machine.

items.title: S02E07 - Hotel
items.summary: Wojo and Wentworth pose as marrieds in order to bust a burglary ring set in a posh hotel.

infolabels.title: Hotel
infolabels.plot: Wojo and Wentworth pose as marrieds in order to bust a burglary ring set in a posh hotel.

items.title: S02E08 - Discovery
items.summary: Marty claims that a member of the 12th is harassing the gay community; the precinct computers think Fish is dead.

infolabels.title: Discovery
infolabels.plot: Marty claims that a member of the 12th is harassing the gay community; the precinct computers think Fish is dead.

items.title: S02E09 - You Dirty Rat
items.summary: Barney smells a rat when two pounds of confiscated marijuana disappears from the evidence locker, and a homeless man spends the night in a department storeâ€”apparently one of many.

infolabels.title: You Dirty Rat
infolabels.plot: Barney smells a rat when two pounds of confiscated marijuana disappears from the evidence locker, and a homeless man spends the night in a department storeâ€”apparently one of many.

items.title: S02E10 - Horse Thief
items.summary: A hansom cab owner reports his horse missing. A man assaulted in his hotel room insists he was alone.

infolabels.title: Horse Thief
infolabels.plot: A hansom cab owner reports his horse missing. A man assaulted in his hotel room insists he was alone.

items.title: S02E11 - Rain
items.summary: During a very rainy day, the squad must endure both the precinct roof threatening to collapse, and VERY bad Bicentennial jokes from a nightclub comedian-the stationhouse roof literally groaning in response!!

infolabels.title: Rain
infolabels.plot: During a very rainy day, the squad must endure both the precinct roof threatening to collapse, and VERY bad Bicentennial jokes from a nightclub comedian-the stationhouse roof literally groaning in response!!

items.title: S02E12 - Fish
items.summary: A glimpse at Detective Fish's home life ensues when the detective decides to go on restricted duty. Steve Landesberg bows as Arthur Dietrich; Doris Belack fills in for Florence Stanley as Bernice Fish.

infolabels.title: Fish
infolabels.plot: A glimpse at Detective Fish's home life ensues when the detective decides to go on restricted duty. Steve Landesberg bows as Arthur Dietrich; Doris Belack fills in for Florence Stanley as Bernice Fish.

items.title: S02E13 - Hot Dogs
items.summary: A man is convinced that a photo of Jean Harlow is his missing wife; a pair of lady cops makes an overzealous drug bust.

infolabels.title: Hot Dogs
infolabels.plot: A man is convinced that a photo of Jean Harlow is his missing wife; a pair of lady cops makes an overzealous drug bust.

items.title: S02E14 - Protection
items.summary: The citizenry is in a panic amidst the rumors that the 12th Precinct is being shut down; a repentent hood can't prove that he committed a crime.

infolabels.title: Protection
infolabels.plot: The citizenry is in a panic amidst the rumors that the 12th Precinct is being shut down; a repentent hood can't prove that he committed a crime.

items.title: S02E15 - Happy New Year
items.summary: On New Year's Eve, Fish tries to stop a jumper, and Wojo delivers a baby.

infolabels.title: Happy New Year
infolabels.plot: On New Year's Eve, Fish tries to stop a jumper, and Wojo delivers a baby.

items.title: S02E16 - Sniper
items.summary: A con man is selling charter flights to Saturn; Wojo and Luger are sniper targets.

infolabels.title: Sniper
infolabels.plot: A con man is selling charter flights to Saturn; Wojo and Luger are sniper targets.

items.title: S02E17 - Fear of Flying
items.summary: Wojo must escort a bigamist to Cleveland, even though he is (guess!) afraid of flying. Meanwhile,the bigamist's New York wife shows up. Also, a man turns in an unmarked envelope containing $3500 in cash.

infolabels.title: Fear of Flying
infolabels.plot: Wojo must escort a bigamist to Cleveland, even though he is (guess!) afraid of flying. Meanwhile,the bigamist's New York wife shows up. Also, a man turns in an unmarked envelope containing $3500 in cash.

items.title: S02E18 - Block Party
items.summary: Wentworth is furious when Chano gets the credit for her bust of an assassin at a block party.

infolabels.title: Block Party
infolabels.plot: Wentworth is furious when Chano gets the credit for her bust of an assassin at a block party.

items.title: S02E19 - Massage Parlor
items.summary: Wentworth busts a dime-store cowboy in a massage parlor, and the detectives bust an octogenarian mugger.

infolabels.title: Massage Parlor
infolabels.plot: Wentworth busts a dime-store cowboy in a massage parlor, and the detectives bust an octogenarian mugger.

items.title: S02E20 - The Psychiatrist
items.summary: A department psychiatrist advises the department to confiscate Wojo's gun

infolabels.title: The Psychiatrist
infolabels.plot: A department psychiatrist advises the department to confiscate Wojo's gun

items.title: S02E21 - The Kid
items.summary: Fish is attracted to the mother of a young mugger; a man is a bit premature to obtain the unclaimed windfall he found on the street.

infolabels.title: The Kid
infolabels.plot: Fish is attracted to the mother of a young mugger; a man is a bit premature to obtain the unclaimed windfall he found on the street.

items.title: S02E22 - The Mole
items.summary: Fish considers an operation; a burglar known as ""The Mole"" leads Harris and Wojo on a merry chase through the city sewer system. Ron Carey plays the Mole, and returns as Levitt in the next season.

infolabels.title: The Mole
infolabels.plot: Fish considers an operation; a burglar known as ""The Mole"" leads Harris and Wojo on a merry chase through the city sewer system. Ron Carey plays the Mole, and returns as Levitt in the next season.

items.title: S03E01 - Evacuation
items.summary: Wojo is dismayed to discover that the city doesn't have up-to-date evacuation procedures in the event of an emergency; Fish meets Jilly Pappalardo, a young thief who he will eventually care for in the ""Barney"" spin-off ""Fish.""

infolabels.title: Evacuation
infolabels.plot: Wojo is dismayed to discover that the city doesn't have up-to-date evacuation procedures in the event of an emergency; Fish meets Jilly Pappalardo, a young thief who he will eventually care for in the ""Barney"" spin-off ""Fish.""

items.title: S03E02 - Quarantine (1)
items.summary: Wojo brings in a sick perp who collapses on the floor...resulting in the 12th being put under quarantine,with the following personnel present:A lady of the evening [who gets friendly with Fish!], Marty and Mr Driscoll, and of course, Inspector Lugar....

infolabels.title: Quarantine (1)
infolabels.plot: Wojo brings in a sick perp who collapses on the floor...resulting in the 12th being put under quarantine,with the following personnel present:A lady of the evening [who gets friendly with Fish!], Marty and Mr Driscoll, and of course, Inspector Lugar....

items.title: S03E03 - Quarantine (2)
items.summary: The quarantined 12th Precinct tries to make it through the night: Lugar has a 'talk' with Marty and Daryl Driscoll; and Harris has a loud rant in his sleep.

infolabels.title: Quarantine (2)
infolabels.plot: The quarantined 12th Precinct tries to make it through the night: Lugar has a 'talk' with Marty and Daryl Driscoll; and Harris has a loud rant in his sleep.

items.title: S03E04 - Bus Stop
items.summary: Quarters are tight at the 12th when a holdup man is confined with his busload of victims.

infolabels.title: Bus Stop
infolabels.plot: Quarters are tight at the 12th when a holdup man is confined with his busload of victims.

items.title: S03E05 - The Election
items.summary: Election Day at the One-Two includes: A woman, being held from voting by her husband, throws a toilet seat into the street to get attention; a shoplifter gets escorted to vote by Wojo, who promptly 'loses' him; and Inspector Lugar comes electioneering for a old time political hack.

infolabels.title: The Election
infolabels.plot: Election Day at the One-Two includes: A woman, being held from voting by her husband, throws a toilet seat into the street to get attention; a shoplifter gets escorted to vote by Wojo, who promptly 'loses' him; and Inspector Lugar comes electioneering for a old time political hack.

items.title: S03E06 - Werewolf
items.summary: A disturbance in the park turns out to be a man who claims to be a werewolf.

infolabels.title: Werewolf
infolabels.plot: A disturbance in the park turns out to be a man who claims to be a werewolf.

items.title: S03E07 - The Recluse
items.summary: A latter-day prophet claims the end is near - 5:30, to be precise; a man who hasn't left his apartment since World War II is brought in for refusing to serve jury duty. John Cassisi appears as Victor Kreutzer, a role he would continue to play on ""Fish.""

infolabels.title: The Recluse
infolabels.plot: A latter-day prophet claims the end is near - 5:30, to be precise; a man who hasn't left his apartment since World War II is brought in for refusing to serve jury duty. John Cassisi appears as Victor Kreutzer, a role he would continue to play on ""Fish.""

items.title: S03E08 - Noninvolvement
items.summary: Barney doesn't see a crime, but Wojo's brought in a man for refusing to aid a mugging victim.

infolabels.title: Noninvolvement
infolabels.plot: Barney doesn't see a crime, but Wojo's brought in a man for refusing to aid a mugging victim.

items.title: S03E09 - Power Failure
items.summary: A power failure darkens spirits at the 12th, where they play host to a man with a split personality.

infolabels.title: Power Failure
infolabels.plot: A power failure darkens spirits at the 12th, where they play host to a man with a split personality.

items.title: S03E10 - Christmas Story
items.summary: Wojo wants to tell Yemana that his Christmas Eve date is a call girl; Fish dons a red suit to catch a mugger who's targeting Kris Kringles; Luger fishes for an invitation from Barney for Christmas Day.

infolabels.title: Christmas Story
infolabels.plot: Wojo wants to tell Yemana that his Christmas Eve date is a call girl; Fish dons a red suit to catch a mugger who's targeting Kris Kringles; Luger fishes for an invitation from Barney for Christmas Day.

items.title: S03E11 - Hash
items.summary: Wojo brings hashish-laced brownies his new girlfriend made to the 12th Precinct, getting the detective squad stoned; while an actor and critic (""natural enemies"" says Harris) square off with dueling swords.

infolabels.title: Hash
infolabels.plot: Wojo brings hashish-laced brownies his new girlfriend made to the 12th Precinct, getting the detective squad stoned; while an actor and critic (""natural enemies"" says Harris) square off with dueling swords.

items.title: S03E12 - Smog Alert
items.summary: All eyes are on Fish as the city undergoes a first-stage smog alert; an unlikely connection is made between a potential suicide victim and an obscene graffiti artist.

infolabels.title: Smog Alert
infolabels.plot: All eyes are on Fish as the city undergoes a first-stage smog alert; an unlikely connection is made between a potential suicide victim and an obscene graffiti artist.

items.title: S03E13 - Community Relations
items.summary: An evicted tenant greets a landlord with a musket; Barney's charged with harassment when he books a blind shoplifter.

infolabels.title: Community Relations
infolabels.plot: An evicted tenant greets a landlord with a musket; Barney's charged with harassment when he books a blind shoplifter.

items.title: S03E14 - The Rand Report
items.summary: Rather than return one week per month to uniformed patrol, Wojo quits the force.

infolabels.title: The Rand Report
infolabels.plot: Rather than return one week per month to uniformed patrol, Wojo quits the force.

items.title: S03E15 - Fire '77
items.summary: The 12th may go up in smoke, to the delight of a suicidal couple.

infolabels.title: Fire '77
infolabels.plot: The 12th may go up in smoke, to the delight of a suicidal couple.

items.title: S03E16 - Abduction
items.summary: Barney has his hands full with a couple who want his assistance with their cult-influenced daughter, and Nick's bookie who's arrested for his efforts.

infolabels.title: Abduction
infolabels.plot: Barney has his hands full with a couple who want his assistance with their cult-influenced daughter, and Nick's bookie who's arrested for his efforts.

items.title: S03E17 - Sex Surrogate
items.summary: Weary of waiting for promotion, Levitt announces that he's quitting the force; Barney investigates a sex clinic that borders on brothel status; Harris investigates a rash of crimes ostensibly committed by a juvenile.

infolabels.title: Sex Surrogate
infolabels.plot: Weary of waiting for promotion, Levitt announces that he's quitting the force; Barney investigates a sex clinic that borders on brothel status; Harris investigates a rash of crimes ostensibly committed by a juvenile.

items.title: S03E18 - Moonlighting
items.summary: Barney discovers that Harris has been moonlighting; Dietrich arrests a priest who's fencing stolen goods; a racketeer is using a retarded boy as an assistant.

infolabels.title: Moonlighting
infolabels.plot: Barney discovers that Harris has been moonlighting; Dietrich arrests a priest who's fencing stolen goods; a racketeer is using a retarded boy as an assistant.

items.title: S03E19 - Asylum
items.summary: Marty is picked up for parole violation with a half ounce of marijuana; Wojo prematurely grants a Russian defector asylum.

infolabels.title: Asylum
infolabels.plot: Marty is picked up for parole violation with a half ounce of marijuana; Wojo prematurely grants a Russian defector asylum.

items.title: S03E20 - Group Home
items.summary: Yemana assists a bigoted Army officer when a bomber threatens a recruiting facility; it's Fish's turn for mugging detail as Victor and Jilly resurface with Bernice in tow.

infolabels.title: Group Home
infolabels.plot: Yemana assists a bigoted Army officer when a bomber threatens a recruiting facility; it's Fish's turn for mugging detail as Victor and Jilly resurface with Bernice in tow.

items.title: S03E21 - Strike (1)
items.summary: An impending strike is on everyone's mind, except the woman who was robbed by her computer date. (Part 1 of 2)

infolabels.title: Strike (1)
infolabels.plot: An impending strike is on everyone's mind, except the woman who was robbed by her computer date. (Part 1 of 2)

items.title: S03E22 - Strike (2)
items.summary: Barney and Inspector Luger man the fort alone when the detectives go out on strike.

infolabels.title: Strike (2)
infolabels.plot: Barney and Inspector Luger man the fort alone when the detectives go out on strike.

items.title: S04E01 - Goodbye, Mr. Fish (1)
items.summary: A neighborhood vigilante group runs amok, and Fish is AWOL on the day of his retirement.

infolabels.title: Goodbye, Mr. Fish (1)
infolabels.plot: A neighborhood vigilante group runs amok, and Fish is AWOL on the day of his retirement.

items.title: S04E02 - Goodbye, Mr. Fish (2)
items.summary: Fish finally shows up for work, but refuses to acknowledge his mandatory retirement.

infolabels.title: Goodbye, Mr. Fish (2)
infolabels.plot: Fish finally shows up for work, but refuses to acknowledge his mandatory retirement.

items.title: S04E03 - Bugs
items.summary: Listening devices discovered in the squad room may have come from Internal Affairs - or the Nixon administration!

infolabels.title: Bugs
infolabels.plot: Listening devices discovered in the squad room may have come from Internal Affairs - or the Nixon administration!

items.title: S04E04 - Corporation
items.summary: A quixotic environmentalist faces the high-priced lawyer hired by the chemical plant he's been assaulting.

infolabels.title: Corporation
infolabels.plot: A quixotic environmentalist faces the high-priced lawyer hired by the chemical plant he's been assaulting.

items.title: S04E05 - Burial
items.summary: Retired Sergeant Fish returns to assist Barney in locating a pilfered corpse.

infolabels.title: Burial
infolabels.plot: Retired Sergeant Fish returns to assist Barney in locating a pilfered corpse.

items.title: S04E06 - Copy Cat
items.summary: Yemana scours the TV Guide to try to second-guess the felon who's aping the prime-time lineup crime shows; a drunk forgets the most important element in a hold-up - a weapon.

infolabels.title: Copy Cat
infolabels.plot: Yemana scours the TV Guide to try to second-guess the felon who's aping the prime-time lineup crime shows; a drunk forgets the most important element in a hold-up - a weapon.

items.title: S04E07 - Blizzard
items.summary: A blizzard holes up the 12th with an unwelcome guestâ€”a corpse; a self-proclaimed prophet is sure that the weather is indicative of a new ice age.

infolabels.title: Blizzard
infolabels.plot: A blizzard holes up the 12th with an unwelcome guestâ€”a corpse; a self-proclaimed prophet is sure that the weather is indicative of a new ice age.

items.title: S04E08 - Chase
items.summary: A taxi company is irate when Wojo totals a borrowed cab while pursuing a robbery suspect; Lieutenant Scanlon tries to ferret out 12th Precinct corruption with a drug pusher.

infolabels.title: Chase
infolabels.plot: A taxi company is irate when Wojo totals a borrowed cab while pursuing a robbery suspect; Lieutenant Scanlon tries to ferret out 12th Precinct corruption with a drug pusher.

items.title: S04E09 - Thanksgiving Story
items.summary: The detectives clean up after three mental patients sit down to Thanksgiving dinner at an automat.

infolabels.title: Thanksgiving Story
infolabels.plot: The detectives clean up after three mental patients sit down to Thanksgiving dinner at an automat.

items.title: S04E10 - Tunnel
items.summary: Wojo is buried alive after a tunnel collapses on a burglar burrowing towards the diamond exchange; a homeless Harris is combing Manhattan for a new apartment.

infolabels.title: Tunnel
infolabels.plot: Wojo is buried alive after a tunnel collapses on a burglar burrowing towards the diamond exchange; a homeless Harris is combing Manhattan for a new apartment.

items.title: S04E11 - Atomic Bomb
items.summary: Neither the bomb squad nor the government recognizes a college student's physics project as a functional atomic bomb - but Detective Dietrich does.

infolabels.title: Atomic Bomb
infolabels.plot: Neither the bomb squad nor the government recognizes a college student's physics project as a functional atomic bomb - but Detective Dietrich does.

items.title: S04E12 - The Bank
items.summary: A man charges a sperm bank with murder after the lab unwittingly destroys the man's last sample.

infolabels.title: The Bank
infolabels.plot: A man charges a sperm bank with murder after the lab unwittingly destroys the man's last sample.

items.title: S04E13 - The Ghost
items.summary: The detectives are unimpressed with a man who claims he's being visited by a poltergeist - that is, until they lock the man up and strange events begin occurring about the squad room.

infolabels.title: The Ghost
infolabels.plot: The detectives are unimpressed with a man who claims he's being visited by a poltergeist - that is, until they lock the man up and strange events begin occurring about the squad room.

items.title: S04E14 - Appendicitis
items.summary: Yemana is hospitalized with appendicitis; the cage is a stopping-off place for a sugar addict and an aging bounty hunter.

infolabels.title: Appendicitis
infolabels.plot: Yemana is hospitalized with appendicitis; the cage is a stopping-off place for a sugar addict and an aging bounty hunter.

items.title: S04E15 - Rape
items.summary: The city legalizes off-track gambling, to the delight of Yemana; a woman wants her husband arrested on a rape charge; a master of disguise perpetuates a crime spree.

infolabels.title: Rape
infolabels.plot: The city legalizes off-track gambling, to the delight of Yemana; a woman wants her husband arrested on a rape charge; a master of disguise perpetuates a crime spree.

items.title: S04E16 - Eviction (1)
items.summary: Barney puts his career on the line by refusing to forcibly evict the tenants of a condemned hotel, while Lugar tries to figure out what to do with his vacation time.

infolabels.title: Eviction (1)
infolabels.plot: Barney puts his career on the line by refusing to forcibly evict the tenants of a condemned hotel, while Lugar tries to figure out what to do with his vacation time.

items.title: S04E17 - Eviction (2)
items.summary: The hotel situation now involves a SWAT team, while Dietrich learns the identity of his amnesic ""girlfriend.""

infolabels.title: Eviction (2)
infolabels.plot: The hotel situation now involves a SWAT team, while Dietrich learns the identity of his amnesic ""girlfriend.""

items.title: S04E18 - Wojo's Problem
items.summary: Wojo comes to Barney with a problem his superior would rather not know about; the 12th's new female detective has a very jealous husband, suspicious of her all-male co-workers; somehow a shoplifter escapes - in a wheelchair.

infolabels.title: Wojo's Problem
infolabels.plot: Wojo comes to Barney with a problem his superior would rather not know about; the 12th's new female detective has a very jealous husband, suspicious of her all-male co-workers; somehow a shoplifter escapes - in a wheelchair.

items.title: S04E19 - 'Quo Vadis?'
items.summary: Barney uncovers, if you will, the real reason behind a woman's vehement insistence that a nude-painting exhibit at a local art gallery be shut down; the Millers may be heading for divorce.

infolabels.title: 'Quo Vadis?'
infolabels.plot: Barney uncovers, if you will, the real reason behind a woman's vehement insistence that a nude-painting exhibit at a local art gallery be shut down; the Millers may be heading for divorce.

items.title: S04E20 - Hostage
items.summary: Harris finally finds an apartment in the Village; a ventriloquist insists he's not responsible for his dummy's insensitive remarks; a prisoner holds the boys at gunpoint.

infolabels.title: Hostage
infolabels.plot: Harris finally finds an apartment in the Village; a ventriloquist insists he's not responsible for his dummy's insensitive remarks; a prisoner holds the boys at gunpoint.

items.title: S04E21 - Evaluation
items.summary: The members of the squad nervously await Barney filling out their evaluation forms. Meanwhile, Harris arrests a numerologist who will only give his name as ""1223,"" and a porno shop reporting vandalism turns out to be a mom and pop operation being hassled by their kids.

items.title: S06E01 - Inquisition
items.summary: When an anonymous letter identifies a member of the 12th Precinct as a homosexual, it buys the boys a visit from Lieutenant Scanlon, who proceeds to make a witch hunt out of his search for the author. Meanwhile, a disgruntled shopper takes a fire axe to an elevator's MUZAK machine.

infolabels.title: Inquisition

Meanwhile, a disgruntled shopper takes a fire axe to an elevator's MUZAK machine.

infolabels.title: Advancement
infolabels.plot: Luger wants Barney to pen a letter for his mail-order bride; a lottery winner seeks revenge when the ticket seller loses his winning entry; Harris gets a new book deal.

items.title: S08E03 - The Car
items.summary: A car thief's conscience gets the better of him ... after twenty-five years; Levitt saves a child from a precarious fate; an overzealous sanitation officer goes to extremes.

infolabels.title: The Car
infolabels.plot: A car thief's conscience gets the better of him ... after twenty-five years; Levitt saves a child from a precarious fate; an overzealous sanitation officer goes to extremes.

items.title: S08E04 - Possession
items.summary: A husband is assaulted for forcing his wife into designer jeans; a disorderly conduct report leads to a man who swears he's possessed by an evil spirit.

infolabels.title: Possession
infolabels.plot: A husband is assaulted for forcing his wife into designer jeans; a disorderly conduct report leads to a man who swears he's possessed by an evil spirit.

items.title: S08E05 - Stress Analyzer
items.summary: A job fair brings out the worst in a Peace Corps recruiter; Dietrich volunteers for a department stress experiment.

infolabels.title: Stress Analyzer
infolabels.plot: A job fair brings out the worst in a Peace Corps recruiter; Dietrich volunteers for a department stress experiment.

items.title: S08E06 - Games
items.summary: A manufacturer of computer game processors is accused of espionage; a WAC supplements her income on the street.

infolabels.title: Games
infolabels.plot: A manufacturer of computer game processors is accused of espionage; a WAC supplements her income on the street.

items.title: S08E07 - Homeless
items.summary: The 12th is overrun with homeless vagrants on Christmas; a greeting-card writer snaps; a cattle prod is the weapon of choice for a local merchant.

infolabels.title: Homeless
infolabels.plot: The 12th is overrun with homeless vagrants on Christmas; a greeting-card writer snaps; a cattle prod is the weapon of choice for a local merchant.

items.title: S08E08 - The Tontine
items.summary: The penultimate survivor of a tontine attempts suicide in order to concede the money to his cousin.

infolabels.title: The Tontine
infolabels.plot: The penultimate survivor of a tontine attempts suicide in order to concede the money to his cousin.

items.title: S08E09 - Examination Day
items.summary: The detectives don uniforms while Levitt and the others take sergeant's exams; Luger, working with the squad, is overly rough with a collar, and later with Barney.

infolabels.title: Examination Day
infolabels.plot: The detectives don uniforms while Levitt and the others take sergeant's exams; Luger, working with the squad, is overly rough with a collar, and later with Barney.

items.title: S08E10 - The Clown
items.summary: Street clowns fall prey to a serial mugger; a hundred inmates are sneaked out of holding in the middle of the night.

infolabels.title: The Clown
infolabels.plot: Street clowns fall prey to a serial mugger; a hundred inmates are sneaked out of holding in the middle of the night.

items.title: S08E11 - Chinatown (1)
items.summary: A murder witness is uncooperative, so he, Harris and Dietrich are forced to share an apartment in seclusion until he talks; Lieutenant Scanlon falls for a wealthy mugging victim.

infolabels.title: Chinatown (1)
infolabels.plot: A murder witness is uncooperative, so he, Harris and Dietrich are forced to share an apartment in seclusion until he talks; Lieutenant Scanlon falls for a wealthy mugging victim.

items.title: S08E12 - Chinatown (2)
items.summary: Unless he confesses soon, Harris and Dietrich's unwilling roommate may witness another murder. Meanwhile, harassment charges are pressed against Lieutenant Scanlon.

infolabels.title: Chinatown (2)
infolabels.plot: Unless he confesses soon, Harris and Dietrich's unwilling roommate may witness another murder. Meanwhile, harassment charges are pressed against Lieutenant Scanlon.

items.title: S08E13 - Hunger Strike
items.summary: Dietrich aids an elderly psychiatric patient who may be speaking a foreign language; a nuclear activist goes on a hunger strike to end nuclear arms; Barney declines a deputy inspector nomination.

infolabels.title: Hunger Strike
infolabels.plot: Dietrich aids an elderly psychiatric patient who may be speaking a foreign language; a nuclear activist goes on a hunger strike to end nuclear arms; Barney declines a deputy inspector nomination.

items.title: S08E14 - Arrival
items.summary: Luger's mail-order bride arrives; an elderly woman mugs a man.

infolabels.title: Arrival
infolabels.plot: Luger's mail-order bride arrives; an elderly woman mugs a man.

items.title: S08E15 - Obituary
items.summary: A newspaper obituary causes a stir when the subject turns up alive; the detectives snag a modern-day chicken thief.

infolabels.title: Obituary
infolabels.plot: A newspaper obituary causes a stir when the subject turns up alive; the detectives snag a modern-day chicken thief.

items.title: S08E16 - Inquiry
items.summary: Internal Affairs is called in when a charge of excessive force is leveled against Wojo; an angry parent takes action when his child is declined admission into an exclusive kindergarten.

infolabels.title: Inquiry
infolabels.plot: Internal Affairs is called in when a charge of excessive force is leveled against Wojo; an angry parent takes action when his child is declined admission into an exclusive kindergarten.

items.title: S08E17 - Old Love
items.summary: Dietrich's old flame pays a visit; a former child actor clubs an agent with a telephone.

infolabels.title: Old Love
infolabels.plot: Dietrich's old flame pays a visit; a former child actor clubs an agent with a telephone.

items.title: S08E18 - Altercation
items.summary: Harris and Arnold come to blows; a mugging victim confesses to a twenty-five year old crush on Barney.

infolabels.title: Altercation
infolabels.plot: Harris and Arnold come to blows; a mugging victim confesses to a twenty-five year old crush on Barney.

items.title: S08E19 - Bones
items.summary: A museum presses charges when an Indian retrieves his tribe's ancestral bones from an exhibit; a scoutmaster catches a mugger.

infolabels.title: Bones
infolabels.plot: A museum presses charges when an Indian retrieves his tribe's ancestral bones from an exhibit; a scoutmaster catches a mugger.

items.title: S08E20 - Landmark (1)
items.summary: Wojo's discover of an ancient weapon puts the 12th Precinct up for sale.

infolabels.title: Landmark (1)
infolabels.plot: Wojo's discover of an ancient weapon puts the 12th Precinct up for sale.

items.title: S08E21 - Landmark (2)
items.summary: The 12th Precinct is sold; Dietrich arrests the head of a crime school; Luger tries to duck out on his mail-order bride.

infolabels.title: Landmark (2)
infolabels.plot: The 12th Precinct is sold; Dietrich arrests the head of a crime school; Luger tries to duck out on his mail-order bride.

items.title: S08E22 - Landmark (3)
items.summary: Friends, foes and felons alike drop by to pay their last respects as the detectives prepare to leave for new assignments; Harris contemplates his resignation when he's assigned to Flushing Meadows; Barney recalls friends departed before he turns out the squad room lights for the last time.

infolabels.title: Landmark (3)
infolabels.plot: Friends, foes and felons alike drop by to pay their last respects as the detectives prepare to leave for new assignments; Harris contemplates his resignation when he's assigned to Flushing Meadows; Barney recalls friends departed before he turns out the squad room lights for the last time.
